title: carex × hosoii
intro: Carex × hosoii, a hybrid of Carex species, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Carex × hosoii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
